An iron ore mine in northern Wisconsin could operate for 100 years and generate billion of dollars in economic activity.
We now have driven (health care) costs down to the lowest theyve been in 50 years.
Says President Barack Obama has taken less vacation days than any other president in a generation, while Congress has taken more vacation days than any other Congress in history.
For every dollar a county gets in taxes from new development, it costs us 40 to 50 percent more to provide services.

Says El Paso is the safest city of our size in the nation.

All the really great programs in American history, Social Security, was done without Republicans. Medicare was done without Republican support until the last vote where they realized they had to get on board.
